figures.caption: Fig. 1. OOS return—MACE stock trading, all five agents under baseline vs. AC impact, optimized params. Black line: QQEW benchmark (19%).
Fig. 2. Non-optimized TD3 trading costs—MACE stock trading, baseline vs. AC cost model.
Fig. 3. Average order POV per epoch—MACE stock trading, PPO, optimized vs. non-optimized (AC impact model).
Fig. 4. OOS portfolio value—margin trading, A2C/PPO/DDPG/SAC, baseline vs. AC impact model.
Fig. 5. PPO average order POV per epoch—margin trading.
Fig. 6. OOS annualized return—POE, all five agents under 10 bps baseline vs. AC impact.
Fig. 7. TD3 return and Sharpe per epoch—POE, baseline vs. optimized parameters.
Fig. 8. TD3 (optimized) sharpe per epoch—POE, AC vs. 10 bps baseline impact model.
